pokemon:falinks.name: Falinks
pokemon:falinks.summary: The six of them work together as one Pokémon. Teamwork is also their battle strategy, and they constantly change their formation as they fight.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: The six of them work together as one Pokémon. Teamwork is also their battle strategy, and they constantly change their formation as they fight.
Five of them are troopers, and one is the brass. The brass’s orders are absolute.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: The six of them work together as one Pokémon. Teamwork is also their battle strategy, and they constantly change their formation as they fight.
